props.name: children
props.description: The Step components (or any custom content) rendered inside the stepper.

props.name: initialStep
props.description: The first step to display when the stepper is initialized.

props.name: onStepChange
props.description: Callback fired whenever the step changes.

props.name: onFinalStepCompleted
props.description: Callback fired when the stepper completes its final step.

props.name: stepCircleContainerClassName
props.description: Custom class name for the container holding the step indicators.

props.name: stepContainerClassName
props.description: Custom class name for the row holding the step circles/connectors.

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: Custom class name for the step’s main content container.

props.name: footerClassName
props.description: Custom class name for the footer area containing navigation buttons.

props.name: backButtonProps
props.description: Extra props passed to the Back button.

props.name: nextButtonProps
props.description: Extra props passed to the Next/Complete button.

props.name: nextButtonText
props.description: Text for the Next button when not on the last step.

props.name: disableStepIndicators
props.description: Disables click interaction on step indicators.
